filename: Role description of Färkkilä lab IT Specialist_.docx
relative_path: PERSONNEL/Lab Management team /Role descriptions /Role description of Färkkilä lab IT Specialist_.docx
full_text:
Role description of Färkkilä lab IT Specialist

Data management and coordination in network drives and in database

Managing cloud-based data storage services like allas, databank, network drives (P-drive, L-drive, Google drive, datacloud ).

Development and maintenance of research data structures in all these storages .

Assistance with secure data transfer to CSC-Allas and Databank.

Contact Person: Deb /Joonas

CSC cloud computing management and coordination

Management of CSC cloud computing environments and user access for lab projects.

Setup and testing of bioinformatic tool environments and containers (Apptainer), scripts etc to run lab projects (analysis task) in CSC environments.

Maintenance of Linux-based workstations and remote access configurations in the lab.

Contact Person: Deb /Iga

Project documentation in github and google drive

Version control and workflow documentation in Git/GitHub.

Project documentation in Google Drive

Contact Person: Deb /Joonas

Web and digital services

Maintenance and content updates of the lab website.

Support in creating online interfaces for lab services.

Contact Person: Deb

Logistics Support

Ordering logistics for lab members

Contact Person: Deb /Joonas
